title: Trump caught unprepared by escalation of war with Iran
subhead: The American president has made a series of contradictory statements and is struggling to justify the joint US-Israeli intervention to the public, especially as the closure of the Strait of Hormuz and strikes on energy sites in the Gulf have fueled inflation.

title: Putin conducts a 'special musical operation' in Europe
subhead: Barred from the West, Valery Gergiev, maestro at the helm of Russia's two leading opera houses and cultural ambassador for Vladimir Putin, is seeking a return to conducting in Europe's major concert halls. In this cultural arena, Moscow is shifting from 'soft power' to 'sharp power.'

title: Chuck Norris, king of martial arts and Reagan-era action movies, has died
subhead: The American actor best known for the hit series 'Walker, Texas Ranger' died on Friday, at the age of 86.

title: War in Iran: 'Europe said no to the US. This is new, and it is a major development'
subhead: The Europeans' refusal to join Washington in the current Middle East war shows that the transatlantic rift is deeper than the one seen during the 2003 Iraq crisis, observes Le Monde columnist Sylvie Kauffmann.

title: Five takeaways from the first round of French local elections
subhead: The 2026 municipal elections have already concluded in the vast majority of French towns, with a mayor being directly elected in the first round. In larger cities, however, the right and the Socialists are in the lead for the second round.
